identity.name: JobSwipe
identity.description: A high-energy, dark-mode-first job matching platform that blends the addictive mechanics of dating apps with the professional clarity of SaaS tools.

SwipeDeck.description: The core interaction. A stack of cards that can be swiped left/right.
requirements: Must have spring animations on release.

JobCard.description: A full-screen or card-sized element displaying job details.

MatchModal.description: A full-screen overlay when a match occurs.
visuals: Two avatars animating towards each other.

Navigation.style: Floating glass pill at the bottom of the screen. Icons only on mobile, Icons + Labels on Desktop.

assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react'. Key icons: Briefcase, X, Heart, Star, User, MessageCircle, Settings.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Install 'framer-motion' immediately using 'npm install framer-motion' or 'yarn add framer-motion'. This is essential for the swipe physics.
Implement a 'Dark Mode' toggle but default to Dark Mode.
Use the 'Outfit' font from Google Fonts for headings. Add it to index.html or import in CSS.
For the Swipe Deck, build a custom one using 'framer-motion' (Preferred for control).
The 'Priority Apply' button should trigger a special animation (shake + glow).
For the Recruiter Dashboard, use a 'Bento Grid' layout to show stats, recent applicants, and active jobs.
DO NOT use generic blue for primary actions. Use the specified Neon Indigo (#6366f1).
universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 for icons.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
